A BRIEF EF-0 TORNADO IMPACTED FRANKLIN COUNTY ON FRIDAY, MAY 27TH, 2022. THE TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT APPROXIMATELY 11:45 AM EDT NEAR HARTZOK ROAD AND QUICKLY DISSIPATED AT 11:46 AM EDT AFTER CROSSING HARTZOK ROAD, TRAVELING ABOUT 0.28 MILES. THE TORNADO DESTROYED ONE POLE BARN, DAMAGED AN OUTBUILDING, MOVED A SHED OFF ITS FOUNDATION, DAMAGED A HOME, AND SNAPPED MANY HARDWOOD TREES.

A BRIEF EF-0 TORNADO IMPACTED FRANKLIN COUNTY ON FRIDAY, MAY 27TH, 2022. THE TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT APPROXIMATELY 11:45 AM EDT NEAR HARTZOK ROAD AND QUICKLY DISSIPATED AT 11:46 AM EDT AFTER CROSSING HARTZOK ROAD, TRAVELING ABOUT 0.28 MILES. THE TORNADO DESTROYED ONE POLE BARN, DAMAGED AN OUTBUILDING, MOVED A SHED OFF ITS FOUNDATION, DAMAGED A HOME, AND SNAPPED MANY HARDWOOD TREES.

A BRIEF EF-0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN THE VICINITY OF ENOLA ROAD JUST WEST OF LONGS GAP RD IN CARLISLE, CUMBERLAND COUNTY. THE TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT APPROXIMATELY 12:42 PM EDT AND LASTED LESS THAN 1 MINUTE. THE TORNADO TIPPED OVER A TRAILER AND SNAPPED SEVERAL HARDWOOD TREE LIMBS BEFORE DISSIPATING.

*** 3 INJ *** AN EF-1 TORNADO IMPACTED SOUTHEASTERN LANCASTER COUNTY ON FRIDAY, MAY 27, 2022. THE TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT APPROXIMATELY 2:11 PM EDT NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF MAPLE SHADE ROAD AND KIRKWOOD PIKE IN KIRKWOOD, PA AND TRAVELED TOWARDS THE NORTHEAST FOR APPROXIMATELY 3.1 MILES BEFORE DISSIPATING NEAR RYNEAR RD IN CHRISTIANA, PA AT APPROXIMATELY 2:16 PM EDT. THE TORNADO DESTROYED SEVERAL LARGE BARNS AND OUTBUILDINGS AND CAUSED THREE MINOR INJURIES.
